articles.headline: 7,648 disaster incidents reported in a year
articles.description: KATHMANDU: A total of 7,648 disaster incidents were recorded over the past year, with fire-related incidents—including wildfires—making up the largest share. According to the National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Authority, the high number of fire i…

articles.headline: No, BBC, Disaster Losses Can’t Be Tied to Climate Change
articles.description: Presenting trillion-dollar model outputs as settled economic fact is bad journalism and the BBC should be ashamed for presenting such easily falsified rubbish as fact. That’s the true disaster here.
